title: Best AI Logo Generator: How to Make Logo With AI (2026 Comparison)
summary: A hands-on comparison of five AI logo generators: Design.com, BrandCrowd, Canva, Wix Logo Maker, and Vistaprint. The video tests each tool on the same brief to evaluate output quality, AI chat editing capabilities, licensing, and brand kit generation in 2026.
